subtitle.en: Whether you are planning international travel, business inspection, or visiting friends and family, ZSTS will provide you with professional and efficient one-stop visa services.
subtitle.zh:
无论您是计划出国旅游、商务考察，还是探亲访友，
                中盛启瀚都将为您提供专业、高效的一站式签证服务。

desc.zh: 依托沙特阿拉伯授权签证中心，聚焦沙特市场的综合商业服务公司，致力于构筑中沙两国高质量发展桥梁。

badge.zh: 全球签证服务 · 一站式办理

desc.zh: 覆盖全球200+国家签证代办，专业团队一对一服务，98%出签率保障

subtitle.zh: 极速办理 · 全程服务

desc.en: Choose the most convenient way to contact us
desc.zh: 选择您方便的方式联系我们

title.zh: 全球签证办理 | 中盛启瀚 ZSTS

zh.q: 办理签证需要多长时间？
zh.a: 不同国家签证时间不同，一般旅游签证5-10个工作日，商务签证7-15个工作日，加急服务可缩短至3-5个工作日。
我们整体出签率保持在98%以上，专业顾问会在提交前严格审核材料，确保符合使馆要求。

zh.q: 可以代办哪些国家的签证？
zh.a: 我们覆盖全球200+国家和地区，包括沙特、阿联酋、土耳其、埃及、摩洛哥、欧洲申根国、美国、加拿大、澳大利亚、新西兰等。
基本材料包括护照、照片、在职证明、银行流水等，具体材料清单根据目的地国家和签证类型而定，顾问会提供详细清单。
费用包含签证费、服务费、材料审核、代为递交、进度跟踪等全套服务，透明收费无隐形费用。

en.q: How long does visa processing take?
en.a: Processing times vary by country. Tourist visas typically take 5-10 business days, business visas 7-15 business days. Expedited service can reduce to 3-5 days.
Our overall approval rate exceeds 98%. Professional consultants strictly review materials before submission to ensure embassy compliance.

en.q: Which countries can you process visas for?
en.a: We cover 200+ countries including Saudi Arabia, UAE, Turkey, Egypt, Morocco, Schengen countries, USA, Canada, Australia, New Zealand, and more.
Basic documents include passport, photos, employment certificate, bank statements. Specific requirements vary by destination and visa type; consultants provide detailed checklists.

en.q: What services are included in the fee?
en.a: Fees cover visa fees, service charges, document review, embassy submission, and progress tracking—transparent pricing with no hidden costs.

subtitle.en: From document submission to visa collection, guided by professional advisors
subtitle.zh: 从提交材料到拿到签证，全程专业顾问陪同指引

zh.title: 在线咨询
zh.desc: 联系专属顾问，告知出行目的和国家，获取个性化签证方案

zh.title: 准备材料
zh.desc: 按目标国家清单准备申请材料，顾问免费审核，确保材料合规完整

zh.title: 提交申请
zh.desc: 材料审核通过后，代为向对应国家大使馆/签证中心提交正式申请

zh.title: 审核跟进
zh.desc: 全程跟进使馆/签证中心审核进度，第一时间反馈最新状态

zh.title: 出签寄回
zh.desc: 出签成功后通知取签或快递寄回，顺利踏上旅程

en.title: Online Consultation
en.desc: Contact your dedicated consultant, share your travel purpose and destination, and receive a personalized visa plan

en.title: Prepare Documents
en.desc: Prepare application materials according to the destination country checklist, with free consultant review

en.title: Submit Application
en.desc: After document approval, submit the formal application to the corresponding embassy or visa center

en.title: Follow-up
en.desc: Track the embassy/visa center review progress and provide timely status updates

en.title: Visa Issued
en.desc: Once approved, collect your visa or have it couriered to you—ready for your journey

subtitle.en: Six major regions covered, with tourist, business, training, and expedited visa services available
subtitle.zh: 覆盖六大热门区域，提供旅游、商务及加急等多种签证类型服务

title.zh: 全球签证 · 按区域选择目的地
